CGM connections

Pull readings automatically from your CGM cloud. Credentials are encrypted at rest and synced every minute. Choose a provider:

    Devices & tokens

    Create a token for an uploader (xDrip+, Loop, AndroidAPS, Trio) or a follower app. Shown once — copy it now. Tokens travel in headers only.
